class.name: Logger
class.brief_description: Custom logger to receive messages from the internal error/warning stream.
class.description: Custom logger to receive messages from the internal error/warning stream. Loggers are registered via [method OS.add_logger].

method.name: _log_error
method.description: Called when an error is logged. The error provides the [param function], [param file] and [param line] that it originated from, as well as either the [param code] that generated the error or a [param rationale]. The type of error provided by [param error_type] is described in the [enum ErrorType] enumeration. Additionally, in debug builds, the [param script_backtraces] will be made available to this function. [b]Warning:[/b] This function may be called from multiple different threads, so you may need to do your own locking.

method.name: _log_message
method.description: Called when any message is logged, including errors. If [param error] is [code]true[/code], then this message was meant to be sent to [code]stderr[/code]. [b]Warning:[/b] This function may be called from multiple different threads, so you may need to do your own locking.

constants.constant: The message received is an error.
The message received is a warning.
The message received is a script error.
The message received is a shader error.
